title: lamiastrum argentatum
intro: Lamiastrum argentatum, also known as woolly betony or argentine lamb's ear, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the family Lamiaceae. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which can aid in wound healing and skin issues. The health benefits of Lamiastrum argentatum include its ability to reduce anxiety and promote better sleep, thanks to its calming and sedative properties. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in teas, tinctures, and salves, which are often used to soothe skin irritations, calm the nervous system, and promote overall well-being.
